description: Shared Qlik Compose REST API connection. Qlik Compose is the data-warehouse automation tool in the Qlik Data Integration platform. Pairs with qlik_compose_workflow_trigger_job / qlik_compose_workflow_status_sensor / qlik_compose_workflow_metrics_ingestion / qlik_compose_workspace.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with the Compose base URL (no /api path).

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var with Compose username. Required unless api_token_env_var is set.

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var with Compose password. Required unless api_token_env_var is set.

api_token_env_var.label: API Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with Compose API token. Preferred for production.
